synonyms: Выбрасывать, избавляться - discard, dispose of, throw away
Выгонять, удалять (кого-либо) - eject, expel, kick out

examples.eng: She threw him out of the house.
She threw out all the expired food.
Don't throw that out! I need it.
examples.ru: Не выбрасывай это! Мне это нужно.

examples.eng: The student was thrown out of class.
He was thrown out of the bar.
They threw out the disruptive fans.
Don't throw me out! Give me another chance.
examples.ru: Не выгоняй меня! Дай мне ещё один шанс.

examples.eng: He threw out his old clothes.
We usually throw out all our old magazines.
examples.ru: Мы обычно выбрасываем все старые журналы.
